pricingFaqData.question: How does Finn pricing work?
pricingFaqData.answer: Finn is wallet-based — not a subscription. You pick a plan (Starter / Pro / Growth / Enterprise) that sets your per-AI-credit rate, minimum top-up, and concurrent-call cap. You top up the wallet, and credits are deducted in real time as calls run. You only pay when you top up; nothing recurs.

pricingFaqData.question: What is an AI credit?
pricingFaqData.answer: An AI credit is the unit of consumption for every Finn call. Each call deducts credits from your wallet at your plan's rate. The dashboard shows the per-call ledger so you can see exactly what was spent and why.

pricingFaqData.question: Do credits expire?
pricingFaqData.answer: No. Credits never expire as long as the workspace is active. Top up once, and your balance stays available until it's used.

pricingFaqData.question: What's the difference between the plans?
pricingFaqData.answer: Plans only differ on three things: rate per credit, minimum top-up, and concurrent-call cap. Starter is ₹10/credit with a ₹2,000 minimum and 2 concurrent calls. Pro is ₹7/credit, ₹10,000 minimum, 20 concurrent. Growth is ₹6/credit, ₹50,000 minimum, 100 concurrent. Enterprise is custom. Every plan gets the full product — same workflow editor, knowledge base, integrations, and compliance.

pricingFaqData.question: Can I switch plans later?
pricingFaqData.answer: Yes, any time. Switch from the dashboard's Billing settings. The new rate applies to future credit purchases; credits already in your wallet keep their original value.

pricingFaqData.question: How do I top up the wallet?
pricingFaqData.answer: From the dashboard's Billing settings. India workspaces pay in INR via Razorpay; other workspaces pay in USD via DodoPayments. Both support cards, UPI, and bank transfers depending on region.

pricingFaqData.question: Do I get free credits to try Finn?
pricingFaqData.answer: Yes — the Starter plan includes 50 free AI credits on signup so you can build, test, and run real calls before topping up.

pricingFaqData.question: What if I want to stop using Finn?
pricingFaqData.answer: Cancel any time from the dashboard. Wallet balances are non-refundable once topped up — credits never expire, so use them whenever you're ready to come back.

pricingFaqData.question: Are phone numbers included?
pricingFaqData.answer: Phone number rental is separate, billed at ₹400 per month per number and deducted from your wallet automatically. You can rent numbers from the Phone Numbers settings page across 40+ countries.

pricingFaqData.question: Is there a setup or onboarding fee?
pricingFaqData.answer: No. Sign up, build your first Finn, and run real calls within minutes. White-glove onboarding is available for Growth and Enterprise plans at no extra cost.

pricingFaqData.question: Do you offer enterprise contracts?
pricingFaqData.answer: Yes. Enterprise plans get custom per-credit rates, custom minimum top-ups, unlimited concurrent calls, SLAs, dedicated support, and a security/compliance review. Email sales@hirefinn.ai or use the Talk to sales button on the Enterprise plan card.

pricingFaqData.question: What's included in every plan?
pricingFaqData.answer: Drag-and-drop workflow editor, knowledge base, 100+ voices across 46 languages, live transfer, post-call analysis, batch calling, SMS/WhatsApp/email follow-ups, calendar integrations, audit log, SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, and DPDP compliance. Plans only gate concurrency and rate — not features.
